scripts.test:tree: rm -rf .tree-test && npx tsc src/features/tree/lineageGraphModel.ts src/features/tree/lineagePathModel.ts src/features/tree/lineageRequestState.ts src/features/tree/lineageSemanticsModel.ts src/features/tree/lineageUrlState.ts src/features/tree/treeDisplayModel.ts --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .tree-test --skipLibCheck && node --test src/features/tree/lineageGraphModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineagePathModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageRequestState.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageSemanticsModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageUrlState.test.mjs src/features/tree/treeDisplayModel.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .tree-test; exit $status
scripts.test:wizard: rm -rf .wizard-state-test && npx tsc src/features/mvp1/domain/status.ts src/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .wizard-state-test --skipLibCheck && sed -i "s|from './status'|from './status.js'|" .wizard-state-test/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.js && node --test src/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .wizard-state-test; exit $status
scripts.test:wizard-session: rm -rf .wizard-session-test && npx tsc src/features/mvp1/domain/status.ts src/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.ts src/features/mvp1/services/wizardSessionService.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --lib ES2020,DOM --outDir .wizard-session-test --skipLibCheck && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test src/features/mvp1/services/wizardSessionService.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .wizard-session-test; exit $status
